CHANGE RECORD 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table. The 
third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated. The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change app lies. Column 5 should include the names 
of the author(s) doing the changes. Including the name in column 6 shows that the document has been 
validated by the TAC/MFC PQ leader or deputy (or TAC/MFC PQ leader or the deputy). This validation 
means the document was checked for contents, formats and consistency with other documents.

7.0 
 
  
Page 4/ 121 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
Case 1 waters Waters whose inherent optical properties (IOPs) are dominated by 
phytoplankton. 
Case 2 waters Waters whose inherent optical properties (IOPs) are not dominated by 
phytoplankton. 
Chlorophyll-a Main pigment used by most phytoplankton for photosynthesis, used as a 
proxy for their presence and abondance. We express it in mg/m³. 
Primary production / 
productivity 
In ocean colour, rate of production of new organic matter by phytoplankton, 
we express it in mg/m²/day of carbon. 
Remote-Sensing 
Reflectance 
Measure of the proportion of incident light that is reflected from the surface 
(of the water in our case). In our applications we typically refer to a small 
number of thin spectral bands (~10nm) named for the band’s centre. 
 Secchi disk depth Measure of water transparency, historically obtained with a Secchi disk 
created in 1865 by Angelo Secchi, which is a plain white, circular disk 30 cm 
in diameter. Expressed in meters.
